Peppes
80+ location will go live June 1st
Booking to live May 12th

Catering App - web based app
You search for everything and add all articles in the same search field. Straight forward. Write Pizza-ost (minus ost) and that article will be added without cheese.

When end-customer uses Peppes App or Peppes.No, that is not MUNU. Over time they will use MUNU webshop, but not at the start. This will be communicated.

Bundles - New feature
Add articles all tied to a default price. All article can have child articles. 
Both the bundle article itself, and the articles it consists of will be registered as sales, so you Get statistics on everything. 

The bundles and article childs have the same UI, question is how to troubleshoot or spot the difference.

wtp_announcements.author: Mathias

wtp_outlook_events.subject: Feedback from Furset Kantine - Support
wtp_outlook_events.body:
Hi,

 

We got some feedback on support from our half-day session in Stavanger last week.
This is summarized as below – We have not looked into if SLA is broken or not, this is either way what the customer has of feedback to us.

We didn’t have “Support” on the agenda, but this feedback came in the section “open mic”, how is it going at your canteens

  • Longer response times on the phone.
  • Longer response times on email.
  • Several cases of no response or follow-up at all – they solve it themselves (which is a bit of luck, I assume).
  • That they often experience knowing more than the people on support, and having to go through many "standard questions" they have already checked themselves.
  • Declining quality and competence in support. (that was very clear feedback in to dialogue)
  • That they meet a lot of different people during a single case.
  • That they don't understand why they have to call back to follow up cases themselves, instead of being called back (which results in multiple points of contact).

 

Lets go together the feedback, and if we can have a plan for them as a feedback.

________________________________________________________________________________

Microsoft Teams-møte

Bli med: https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/312703243840110?p=JmcLn3t5QVJ5RUMVqo

Møte-ID: 312 703 243 840 110

Passord: 8NJ7kD2D

Trenger du hjelp? | Systemreferanse

For arrangører: Møtealternativer

wtp_outlook_events.subject: FYI- Fire drills in Stavanger!
wtp_outlook_events.body:
FYI – fire drills 🧯
Just a heads-up so you can plan around it:
Starting next month, fire drills will take place on the last Friday of each month at 11:00.
There may also be occasional unannounced tests.
This applies to the entire building, so this is to help you avoid scheduling important meetings or calls during this time.
And yes – I know it feels quite frequent 😅 I’ve asked why it needs to happen this often, but haven’t received a clear answer yet. I’ll keep you posted if that changes!
//E

________________________________________________________________________________
Microsoft Teams Trenger du hjelp?
Bli med i møtet nå
Møte-ID: 398 103 848 817 1
Passord: 9cQ7vN9L
For arrangører: Møtealternativer
